questions.text: What time period does Modernism span?
Which of the following best describes 'Experimentation' as a main form of Modernism?
options: Breaking artistic and literary traditions to create new forms of expression
Depicting ordinary people and everyday life
Questioning absolute truths and grand narratives

questions.text: James Joyce's Ulysses uses which narrative technique?
Which Franz Kafka work is cited as an example of Alienation in Modernism?
What does 'Alienation' in Modernism reflect?
options: An individual's sense of isolation and disconnection from society
The influence of mass media on identity

questions.text: What program evaluation strategy postpones evaluating an expression until its value is explicitly required?
Which programming paradigm defines computation primarily through mathematical functions, avoiding side effects?
In compilation, which phase is responsible for converting source text characters into a sequence of tokens?
What terminology represents the range of program instructions wherein a declared variable remains valid?
Which compiler optimization technique replaces function calls with the actual body of the function?
Which three foundational components compose the core model of cyber-defense known as the CIA Triad?
Which cryptography technique utilizes two separate keys (public and private) for encrypting and decrypting data?
What type of attack vector intercepts and potentially alters communication between two legitimate conversing peers?
What is the primary role of a firewall in network-bound security architectures?
options: To monitor network traffic and filter unauthorized access matches
To generate safe security clearance keys automatically

questions.text: Which security mechanism validates the identity of a user before granting resources?
What business platform integrates finance, marketing, and inventory into one synchronized system?
Which of the following is a primary goal of Business Intelligence (BI) tools?
options: Analyzing data to make strategic business decisions

questions.text: What type of database transaction property ensures that a transaction is completed fully or not at all?
Which system acts as a central repository for consolidated enterprise data gathered from multiple distinct sources?
What methodology uses machine learning and statistical models to discover structural patterns in large datasets?
In Android mobile architecture, which activity hook is invoked when the screen is no longer visible to the user?
Which open-source compilation framework uses Dart to produce high-performance native iOS and Android experiences?
What element is responsible for managing background long-running tasks in mobile apps without a user interface?
Which mechanism allows Android apps to communicate system-wide events and receive broadcasts?
How do mobile applications typically persist lightweight key-value pairs locally?
Which HTTP status code indicates a client's request was completed successfully?
What protocol is standard for secure communication over the web?
Which styling layer is responsible for responsive web design layouts?
What is the main purpose of the Document Object Model (DOM) in web browsers?
options: To represent structured HTML/XML documents as a node tree
Serve requests on high-performance backend channels

questions.text: What technology allows visual updates of portions of a web page asynchronously without a full page reload?
